zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude de Ros於大約1333年出生時，她的父親William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros49歲，母親Margery Badlesmere30歲。她於大約1349年與John Welles 4th Lord Welles在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里奧爾蒙達斯 易曼德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年12月9日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯肯德萊比享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude de Ros于大约1333年出生时，她的父亲William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros49岁，母亲Margery Badlesmere30岁。她于大约1349年与John Welles 4th Lord Welles在爱尔兰庫迪 克里奧爾蒙達斯 易曼德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年12月9日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯肯德萊比享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude de Ros was born about 1333, her father, William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros, was 49 and her mother, Margery Badlesmere, was 30. She married John Welles 4th Lord Welles about 1349, in Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 December 1388, in Skendleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude de Ros est née environ 1333, son père, William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margery Badlesmere, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Welles 4th Lord Welles environ 1349, à Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1388, à Skendleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude de Ros um 1333 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros 49 und ihre Mutter Margery Badlesmere 30. Sie hat um 1349 in Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irland John Welles 4th Lord Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1388 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Skendleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude de Ros è nata il circa 1333, sua padre, William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Margery Badlesmere, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Welles 4th Lord Welles circa 1349, nel Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1388, nel Skendleby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude de Rosが約1333年に生まれた時，父William de Ros 2nd Baron de Rosは49歳，母Margery Badlesmereは30歳であった。約1349年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーオルモンド'ス イスランドでJohn Welles 4th Lord Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年12月9日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスケンドレビーで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude de Ros(이)가 대략 1333년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Badlesmere(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1349년 아일랜드 카운티 케리 오몽'스 이슬랜드에서 John Welles 4th Lord Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 12월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스켄들레비에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Skendleby, Lincolnshire, England: Skendleby, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude de Ros nasceu aproximadamente 1333, seu pai, William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margery Badlesmere, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Welles 4th Lord Welles aproximadamente 1349, em Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1388, em Skendleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude de Ros родилась около 1333 г., её отцу по имени William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Badlesmere, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Welles 4th Lord Welles около 1349 г. в местности ормонд'с исланд, коунти кирри, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 декабря 1388 г. в местности скендлеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude de Ros nació aproximadamente 1333, su papá, William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Margery Badlesmere, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Welles 4th Lord Welles aproximadamente 1349, en Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1388, en Skendleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
